ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol used in the market */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company listed */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the stock information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is recorded */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the exchange information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Name of the firm the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily performance, technical analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the stored report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the software or tool used to generate the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update of the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is updated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for data sources that require authentication */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last sync with the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
